title: You Dropped a Bomb on Me
why_this_song: You Dropped a Bomb on Me by Gap Band (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: But you turned me on, baby (you dropped a bomb on me, baby)
You were my thrills, you were my pills
I, I-I, I-I-I won't forget it
I, I-I, I-I-I won't forget it

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dropped" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dropped" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bomb" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bomb" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You were the girl that changed my world
(You dropped a bomb on me, baby)
You were the girl for me

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "You Dropped a Bomb on Me" was released in 1982. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "You Dropped a Bomb on Me" foi lançada em 1982. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
